title: Bedding/Linen Donation Programs - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Volunteering & Donating > Bedding/Linen Donation Programs 50 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Disaster/Emergency Issues GLIDE REVITALIZATION DONATIONS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts small donations of shelf-stable food, pet food, clothing, small appliances, compact furniture, and household goods. Cannot accept large appliances or big furniture. Supports individuals and families impacted by the March 2025 floods in Douglas County. 301 Glide Loop Drive Glide, OR 97443 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-4pm Email (541) 671-0189 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ALBANY HELPING HANDS ALBANY HELPING HANDS THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a store of used and new items including clothing, appliances, household and kitchen items, electronics, books, and linens. Offers vouchers to use at the thrift store for clothing and household goods to anyone in need. Also accepts donations. 705 First Avenue SE Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Thrift Store: Unrestricted Clothing and household goods vouchers: Unrestricted; once every 30 days Hours: Thrift Store: Monday-Saturday 9am-5pm Donations: Monday-Saturday 9am-5pm Email (541) 791-5139 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CASCADE AIDS PROJECT TOD'S CORNER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides clothing, household goods (including kitchen items), bedding and linens, and other items. Accepts donations of men's clothing, kitchenware, small appliances, bedding and linens, and bathroom supplies. 10202 SE 32nd Avenue Suite 601 Milwaukie, OR 97222 Eligibility: Individuals diagnosed with HIV who have a monthly income below 185% of the Federal Poverty Level Hours: Monday 1pm-4pm, Tuesday/Thursday 2pm-5pm, Wednesday 1pm-3pm Email (503) 349-4699 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CLACKAMAS SERVICE CENTER PERSONAL GOODS AND DIAPERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides clothing, hygiene items as available, and household goods, including bedding and kitchenware. Diapers are available through PDX Diaper Bank. Accepts donations of gently used clothing and household items. 8800 SE 80th Avenue Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Clothing and Hygiene supplies: Tuesday-Thursday 10am-1pm Email (503) 771-7914 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE GRESHAM DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of furniture, household items, linens, pots and pans, and small kitchen appliances. No large appliances are accepted. Pickup service available. 464 NE 219th Avenue Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Donation drop-off: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-5pm Pickup service: By appointment Email (503) 235-8786 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE PORTLAND DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of furniture, household items, linens, pots and pans, and small kitchen appliances. No large appliances are accepted. Pickup service available. 3969 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97212 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Donation drop-off: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-5pm Pickup service: By appointment Email (503) 235-8786 1023 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE TIGARD DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of furniture, household items, linens, pots and pans, and small kitchen appliances. No large appliances are accepted. Pickup service available. 9806 SW Tigard Street Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Donation drop-off: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-5pm Pickup service: By appointment Email (503) 235-8786 1023 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FAMILY RESOURCE CENTER ITEMS EXCHANGE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Connects people donating furniture and appliances to those needing those items. Small items like blankets and hygiene items can be brought to the Family Resource Center. 3520 Frontage Road Reedsport, OR 97467 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-2pm Email (541) 271-9700 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FRIENDS OF LINCOLN COUNTY ANIMALS PICK OF THE LITTER THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Thrift store whose proceeds benefit domesticated animals in Lincoln County, both those housed at the Lincoln County Animal Shelter and those living in community households. Accepts donations of clean and working small kitchen appliances, bedding or linen, toys/games, books clothing, kitchenware and other small household items. 558 NE 1st Street Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store: Friday-Saturday 10am-4pm Donations: Thursday-Saturday 10am-3:30pm Email (541) 574-1861 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FURNISH HOPE DONATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accept donations of new or gently used household items, including kitchen basics such as dishes, glassware, bakeware, small appliances, utensils, pots, pans, home furniture, bedding, and cleaning supplies. 1006 SE 9th Street Bend, OR 97702 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Drop off: Monday-Saturday 9am-11am Pick up: Varies (541) 638-0657 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FURNITURE SHARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides used furniture, kitchen, household goods, and food boxes. Accepts furniture, kitchen, and household goods donations. Limited donation pick up is available. 4550 Marion Steet SE Suite C Albany, OR 97322 Eligibility: Low-income households Hours: Furniture Distribution: Monday-Thursday 9am-noon and 1pm-4pm Furniture Drop Off: Friday 9am-4pm Furniture Pickup: Monday-Thursday 9am-noon and 1pm-4pm Email (541) 754-9511 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GOSPEL RESCUE MISSION SECOND CHANCE THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The thrift store generates revenue to support the Gospel Rescue Mission, provides work opportunities for Mission residents, accepts donations of goods from community members, and provides assistance to those in need through a clothing voucher program. 429 SE 6th Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm, Saturday 9am-4pm (541) 479-9748 Get Directions Visit Website More Details IMPACT NW IMPACT NW DANCING TREE RESOURCE CENTER WORKER OF THE DAY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides help navigating resources in the community, information about coordinated access, and information and referral services. Assists on a first-come, first-serve basis with resource information and referral. Supplies fluctuate, but when available may provide Trimet day passes, hygiene items, water/snacks, and clothing. Referrals given for services or items of need that are not accessible through the agency. Donations of unisex clothing and household item are accepted. 10055 E Burnside Street Portland, OR 97216 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Office: Monday-Thursday 9am-noon and 1pm-4pm Donations: Monday-Thursday 9am-4pm Email (503) 721-1740 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JACKSON STREET YOUTH SERVICES DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of clothing, bedding, linens, gift cards, or money. 225 SW 4th Street Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Corvallis: Tuesday-Wednesday 10am-1pm at 225 SW 4th Street, Corvallis, OR 97333 Albany Public Library: Thursday 10am-1pm at 2450 14th Avenue SE, Albany, OR 97322 Email (541) 760-5825 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JOIN JOIN DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of food, blankets, sleeping bags, tarps, camping equipment, socks, underwear, hats, gloves, jackets, and hygiene items (shampoo, conditioner, razors, deodorant, feminine products, etc.) 1435 NE 81st Avenue Suite 100 Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Friday/Saturday/Sunday 9am-5pm, Tuesday/Thursday 10am-4pm. Closed on national holidays. Email (971) 710-5768 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JUST PORCH IT JUST PORCH IT AND ECO WORLD Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides no-contact pickup service for clothing, backpacks, belts, accessories, fabric, hats, purses, shoes, bedding, linens, towels, knickknacks, and small household items to be recycled and repurposed. Also has donation bins for drop off. Serves as a source for local school and church closets, non-profits, disaster relief victims, and thrift stores. Items deemed as unusable are recycled and kept out of landfills. Eligibility: Reusable items for donation, or items that have holes, stains, or are damaged that can be recycled. Does not accept items that are wet or moldy. Hours: Pickup: Varies Phone: Monday-Friday 7am-5pm Donation bins: 24 hours per day / 7 days a week Email (800) 965-6519 Get Directions Visit Website More Details KLAMATH FALLS FIRST UNITED METHODIST CHURCH FOOD PANTRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates a food pantry that has non-perishable items. Blankets and sleeping bags are available to those in need, depending on donations received. Food donations such as peanut butter, canned meat, cereal, and powdered milk are accepted. 230 N 10th Street Klamath Falls, OR 97601 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-noon Email (541) 884-4053 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LOVE INC NEWBERG GAP MINISTRIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Connects people with local churches and service agencies. Basic goods and services are offered to clients as they are donated. Services available may include, but are not limited to: bicycles, breakfast/lunch bags, clothing closets (adults and children), community meals, counseling services, diapers, haircuts, H.U.G.S. (hats, umbrellas, gloves, scarves, and socks), kitchen supplies, laundry service, bedding/linens, personal grooming supplies/toiletries, over-the-counter medications, personal care kits, physical therapy, showers, water bill assistance, and firewood. Accepts donations of bedding and linen, clothing, and personal grooming supplies. 200 S College Street Newberg, OR 97132 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-1pm Email (503) 537-3999 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LOVE INC OF BENTON COUNTY GAP MINISTRIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides children's clothing, personal hygiene items, linens (bedding, towels, etc.), baby bundles (newborn baby supplies and clothing), kitchen supplies, and a gift closet (for when community members can't afford to purchase gifts for special occasions). 4900 NW Hwy 99 Suite 102 Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Low-income community members in need Hours: Helpline: Monday-Thursday 9:30am-1:30pm Email (541) 757-8111 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LOVE INC OF CLACKAMAS COUNTY GAP RESOURCES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides furniture, kitchen items, firewood, medical equipment, personal hygiene supplies, cleaning supplies, and bedding/linens. Accepts donations of similar items. Assistance depends on availability. Follow-ups may be provided once the need is met. Eligibility: Low-income households (self-declared or referred and verified by caseworker, employer, or landlord) Hours: Tuesday/Thursday 10am-1pm Email (503) 650-0153 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LOVE INC OF GREATER HILLSBORO GAP MINISTRIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides essential household items, including beds and bedding, linens, furniture, clothing, diapers, hygiene products, cleaning and laundry supplies, paper goods, and work boots. Donations are accepted of the items the agency distributes, with an ongoing need for couches, kitchen tables, and queen-size or smaller beds (including mattresses, box springs, and frames). Referrals to local food pantries are available. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday noon-2:30pm, Tuesday/Thursday 9:30am-noon Email (503) 917-0205 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LOVE INC OF LINN COUNTY GAP MINISTRIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Basic goods are offered to clients as they are donated. Goods available may include, but are not limited to household items (cleaning supplies, laundry detergent, toilet paper, and paper towels), personal care supplies (such as toothbrushes and shampoo), durable medical goods, diapers and wipes, linens, towels and blankets, kitchenware (dishes, pots and pans, glasses, etc), and baby blankets. Connects people in need with local churches and service agencies. No financial assistance is available. 1606 Santiam Road SE Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Low income individuals and families Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Thursday 9am-1pm, Tuesday 5pm-8pm Email (541) 924-5683 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LOVE INC OF TIGARD, TUALATIN, AND SHERWOOD GAP MINISTRIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides clothing, hygiene supplies, household goods, bedding/linens, over-the counter medicines and supplies, financial training, assistance with resume writing, and nutrition courses. Requests are screened and referred to outside agencies for fulfillment. Assistance is dependent upon available funding and not guaranteed. Also accepts donations of bedding/linens and personal grooming supplies. 10900 SW 121st Avenue Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Wednesday 9:30am-12:30pm Email (503) 443-6888 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MARLA'S MALL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a thrift store with books, toys, household items, new hygiene products, knick-knacks, and clothing including interview or work-appropriate attire. Offers volunteer work experience and credit recovery for students working at the store. Also accepts donations of new and gently used items. 2500 E Street Baker City, OR 97814 Eligibility: Thrift Store: Unrestricted Volunteers: Baker School District high school students Hours: School year: Monday-Thursday 8am-11am and 1pm-4pm, closed holidays. Hours are subject to change. Summer hours: June 16th-July 17th Monday-Thursday 8:30am-12:30pm Email (541) 524-2309 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NW FURNITURE BANK NW FURNITURE BANK VANCOUVER DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of furniture, household items, linens, pots and pans, and small kitchen appliances. No large appliances are accepted. Launder and wash housewares donations prior to pick up. All items must be in good reuseable condition, free of pet hair, rips, and stains. All items will be inspected prior to acceptance. Pickup service available. 13503 SE Mill Plain Boulevard #114 Vancouver, WA 98684 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Drop off: Tuesday-Saturday 9am-4pm Pick up: Appointment required Email (360) 787-7144 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PORTLAND RESCUE MISSION PORTLAND RESCUE MISSION BURNSIDE SHELTER DONATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of blankets, linens in new or nearly new condition (twin sheets, comforters, pillowcases), men's, women's, and children's clothing, travel-sized body wash, soap, shampoo, conditioner, deodorant, toothbrushes, toothpaste, razors, and other personal hygiene items. Food items also accepted. No car seats, furniture, or appliances (large or small). 111 W Burnside Street Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days a week Email (503) 647-7466 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PORTLAND RESCUE MISSION PORTLAND RESCUE MISSION SHEPHERD'S DOOR DONATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of blankets, linens in new or nearly new condition (twin sheets, comforters, pillowcases), men's, women's, and children's clothing, travel-sized body wash, soap, shampoo, conditioner, deodorant, toothbrushes, toothpaste, razors, and other personal hygiene items. Food items also accepted. No car seats, furniture, or appliances (large or small). 13207 NE Halsey Street Portland, OR 97230 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Thursday 1:15pm-3:45pm Email (503) 647-7466 Get Directions Visit Website More Details RAPHAEL HOUSE OF PORTLAND RAPHAEL HOUSE OF PORTLAND DONATION DROP OFF DONATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of new, unopened, and full-size personal hygiene products such as shampoo, conditioner, and body wash. Also accepts toothpaste and toothbrushes, baby hygiene products, natural household cleaning products, high-efficiency laundry detergent, new pillows, new socks and undergarments (for adults and children), twin sheets and blankets, and kitchenware. Does not accept travel-size toiletries, used clothing or shoes, used toys, furniture, cell phones, or any item not in good, clean, working condition. 6161 SE Stark Street Portland, OR 97215 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 1st Thursday of the month 11am-1pm, 3rd Thursday of the month 4pm-6pm Email (503) 243-5159 - Get Directions Visit Website More Details RIGHT 2 DREAM TOO DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of camping gear (tents and sleeping bags), clothing (socks, underwear, shoes, men’s and women’s apparel), bedding (pillows and blankets), toiletries (soap, shampoo, conditioner, toothbrushes, toothpaste, deodorant, body wipes), food (cooked or uncooked), and operational supplies (55-gallon trash bags, paper plates, plastic cutlery). Cash or check donations can be made onsite to support utility and material needs; receipts are available at the front desk. Financial donations may also be mailed to the registered office or made online. Also advocates for policies addressing homelessness and offers volunteer opportunities. 999 N Thunderbird Way Portland, OR 97227 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Saturday 8am-10pm Email Get Directions Visit Website More Details ROGUE VALLEY HUMANE SOCIETY ROGUE VALLEY HUMANE SOCIETY THRIFT STORE THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates a thrift store that sells household goods, books, furniture, toys, clothing, shoes, jewelry, electronics, and various accessories to raise money to benefit animal welfare programs. Donations accepted. 1169 Redwood Avenue Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Friday 9am-4pm, Saturday 9am-2pm Email (541) 955-3367 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ROSEBURG DREAM CENTER HOUSEHOLD GOODS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides dishes, cookware, towels, sheets, blankets, and decor when available. Also accepts donations of these items. 2555 NE Diamond Lake Boulevard Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday 10am-2pm and 4pm-7pm, Tuesday-Thursday 10am-2pm Email (541) 673-5918 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER CLACKAMAS COUNTY THE FATHER'S HEART STREET MINISTRY DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of socks, gloves, tents, sleeping bags, blankets, coats, and men's jeans. 603 12th Street Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-2pm or any time the shelter is open Email (503) 722-9780 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER CLATSOP COUNTY LIFEBOAT SERVICES DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of men's clothing, shoes, blankets (size double and under only), sleeping bands, and tents. 1040 Commercial Street Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Donations: By appointment only Office hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm (503) 741-3572 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER DESCHUTES COUNTY SISTERS CORE DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepting donations of cash, jackets, gloves, food, blankets, cash/gift cards to BiMart, local grocery stores, and restaurants. 222 N Trinity Way Sisters, OR 97759 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 588-2332 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER JACKSON COUNTY ACCESS MEDFORD SEVERE WEATHER SHELTER DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepting donations of blankets, pillows, and sheets; hygiene items including feminine products and adult diapers and pads; new and gently used winter clothing; and unopened pet food. 332 W 6th Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours (458) 488-1220 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER JACKSON COUNTY ASHLAND EMERGENCY WINTER SHELTER DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of clothing, personal hygiene items, shelf stable food, pet food, bedding and linen, camping gear and tents, and monetary. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Office: Monday-Friday 9am-2pm Email (541) 631-2235 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER LANE COUNTY COMMUNITY SHARING WARMING SHELTER DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts winter weather donations of Socks, gloves, jackets, blankets, tents, tarps, etc. 1440 Birch Avenue Cottage Grove, OR 97424 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Email (541) 942-2176 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER LANE COUNTY FIRST CHRISTIAN CHURCH HELPING HEARTS ROOM DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of clothing, light blankets and bedding items, sleeping bags, tarps, tents, and personal hygiene items. Volunteer opportunities are also available. 1166 Oak Street Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday/Thursday 10am-2pm (541) 344-1425 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER LINCOLN COUNTY LINCOLN CITY COMMUNITY SHELTER AND RESOURCE CENTER DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of socks, gloves, jackets, blankets, waterproof shoes, and toilet paper. 2125 NW Highway 101 Lincoln City, OR 97367 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours (541) 270-1005 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER LINCOLN COUNTY NEWPORT COMMUNITY SHELTER AND RESOURCE CENTER DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of socks, gloves, jackets, blankets, and other winter gear. 351 SW 7th Street Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours (541) 270-1005 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER LINN COUNTY SWEET HOME PUBLIC LIBRARY DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of socks, gloves, jackets, and blankets. 1101 13th Avenue Sweet Home, OR 97386 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Thursday 10am-6pm, Friday 10am-5pm, Saturday 11am-3pm Email (541) 367-5007 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SHARING HANDS THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates a thrift store that sells new and used appliances, clothes, electronics, and miscellaneous household goods. Accepts donations in good working condition. 107 W Bishop Way Brownsville, OR 97327 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-4pm Email (541) 466-3003 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SNOWCAP COMMUNITY CHARITIES SNOWCAP COMMUNITY CHARITIES DONATIONS DONATIONS AND VOLUNTEERING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of vehicles, commercially packaged food (canned, boxed, fresh, frozen, or dried), baby food/formula, pet food, clothing, socks, shoes, blankets, bedding, pillows, towels, washcloths, personal care/hygiene products, new toys, books, school supplies, and diapers (infant, toddler, or adult). Offers volunteer opportunities for a variety of roles. 17788 SE Pine Street Portland, OR 97233 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Email (503) 674-8785 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SOUTH LINCOLN RESOURCES ADVENTIST CLOTHING SHARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides gently used clothing, bedding, and towels and accepts donations of like items. 3710 Crestline Drive Waldport, OR 97394 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday 10am-2pm or by appointment Email (541) 563-3710 3 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ST VINCENT DE PAUL LA PINE SOCIAL SERVICES OFFICE SAINT VINCENT DE PAUL LA PINE THRIFT AND CONSIGNMENT STORE THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Thrift store offering donated household items, such as clothing, linens, books, and furniture, also accepts donations of similar items. Limited dontation pick up is available. 51661 Huntington Road La Pine, OR 97739 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store Hours: Monday-Saturday 10am-5pm Donations: Monday -Saturday 10am- until capacity is reached Email (541) 536-1956 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ST VINCENT DE PAUL ROSEBURG PUBLIC SHOWERS, CLOTHING CLOSET, HYGIENE SUPPLIES, BEDDING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers public showers. Also may provide a clothing closet, hygiene packages, and bedding. Donations are welcome. 630 W Stanton Street Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Showers: Tuesday/Thursday 3pm-5pm Clothing closet: 3rd Tuesday of the month 3:30pm-5pm Bedding, and hygiene packages: Monday/Wednesday 10am-2pm Email (541) 580-0680 Get Directions Visit Website More Details TRANSITION PROJECTS ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICE DONATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts year-round donations of non-perishable food, unused personal hygiene products, new or gently used linens, blankets, towels, pillows, adult winter clothing, coats, shoes, underwear, socks and books. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday/Friday 9am-noon, Wednesday 3pm-6pm Email (503) 488-7745 Get Directions Visit Website More Details UNITY SHELTER CHAPMAN PLACE HYGIENE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides showers, laundry facility, clothing, personal care supplies, hot meals four days a week, a to-go meal five days a week, assistance with applying for the Oregon Health Plan (OHP), and information to other health care assistance and social service connections. Accepts donations of paper products, towels, snacks, bottled water, juice, personal care supplies, socks, underwear, and seasonally appropriate clothing. 211 SE Chapman Place Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 11am-4pm Meals: Monday/Thursday 5:30pm-6:30pm, Wednesday/Friday 1pm-2pm Donations: Monday-Friday11am-4pm or Corvallis Daytime Drop-in Center Monday-Friday 9am-noon (530 SW 4th Street, Corvallis 97333) Email (541) 286-5121 Get Directions Visit Website More Details VINA MOSES CENTER VINA'S FREE THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides clothing and shoes including interview-ready clothes, food, home goods, kitchenware (pots, pans, dish sets), and hygiene items. Workforce closet available with work boots and shoes, rain and safety gear. Shopping allowed once per month. Exceptions made for special circumstances. Accepts donations of food, clothing, bedding, linens, kitchenware, toys and games, and hygiene supplies. 968 NW Garfield Avenue Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: -Thrift Store: Monday/Wednesday 1pm-3pm, Tuesday/Thursday 10am-noon and 1pm-3pm, 1st Saturday of the month noon-3pm -Donations: Visit website for current hours Email (541) 753-1420 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YAMHILL COUNTY GOSPEL RESCUE MISSION YAMHILL COUNTY GOSPEL RESCUE MISSION WOMEN'S FACILITY DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of sweatpants, sweaters, jeans, T-shirts, thermals and underwear, socks, backpacks, batteries, hand warmers, juice, tents, tarps, sleeping bags, bed sheets, and pillowcases. Also accepts financial donations and $25 gift cards for guests. 1340 NE Logan Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 7 days per week 8am-5pm Email (503) 472-9766 Get Directions
